local_runtime_dependency_state.local_upgrade_execution_limitation: certifi==2026.5.20 wheel is not present in local caches and sandbox network access is restricted; focused tests were run against the installed local certifi 2026.2.25 environment while the PR diff was reviewed statically.

rfc3161_tsa_validation.before_behavior: Offline evidence-pack verifier validates timestamp.tsr, message imprint, token signature, TSA metadata, chain continuity, cert validity metadata, and replay detection without consulting certifi.
rfc3161_tsa_validation.after_behavior: PR #115 changes only the certifi pinned trust-store package in local-freeze.txt. No RFC3161 verifier or exporter code changes are present in the PR diff.
rfc3161_tsa_validation.external_tsa_tls_note: External TSA requests may indirectly use a CA bundle through TLS libraries, but this repository's LiveRFC3161Client uses an explicit TSA_CA_BUNDLE/USBAY_TSA_CA_BUNDLE for certificate-chain validity evidence and does not directly call certifi.where().

verifier_certificate_trust.before_behavior: Offline governance evidence verifier reconstructs trusted timestamp proof from manifest metadata and timestamp.tsr; certificate chain validity is evidence metadata and fail-closed checked.
verifier_certificate_trust.after_behavior: certifi trust bundle changes from 2026.2.25 to 2026.5.20 in PR lock/freeze data. No verifier trust code path changes.

sha256_lineage.before_behavior: Evidence pack hashes are computed from canonicalized local files and timestamped SHA256 lineage material.
sha256_lineage.after_behavior: Dependency diff does not alter hash inputs, canonicalization code, or timestamped message-imprint construction.

deterministic_exports.before_behavior: Gate history and chain summary are stable across repeated generation; ZIP generation is deterministic.
deterministic_exports.after_behavior: certifi diff does not change exporter ordering, canonical JSON, ZIP metadata, or checksum logic.

observed_local_control.manifest_json_note: Manifest timestamp_utc reflects timestamp proof generation time; this observation is pre-existing RFC3161 timestamp behavior and is not caused by certifi.

tls_chain_handling.before_behavior: External TLS trust can depend on the active CA bundle if external TSA mode is used.
tls_chain_handling.after_behavior: certifi CA bundle contents may change with 2026.5.20. No local external TSA network validation was performed in this sandbox.

offline_verifier_behavior.before_behavior: Offline verifier does not require network access or private keys and does not timestamp raw payloads.
offline_verifier_behavior.after_behavior: Focused offline verifier tests pass in the local installed environment; PR diff does not alter offline verifier code.

fail_closed_decision.reason: No unexpected verifier trust behavior was observed and no evidence-lineage code changed, but local execution under certifi==2026.5.20 could not be performed in this sandbox. Merge recommendation remains false until upgraded-dependency execution evidence from CI or a trusted local environment is attached.
